candidate_paradigm.primary_mechanism: Martin-Löf intensional dependent type theory (Π, Σ, =) + univalence axiom UA (Voevodsky 2010): for types A B: U_i, the canonical map idtoeqv: (A = B) → (A ≃ B) is itself an equivalence; equivalently, (A ≃ B) ≃ (A = B). Identity types Id_A (a, b) treated as PATH SPACES, with reflexivity refl_a : Id_A(a, a) as 'constant path'; transport over paths transport_p : P(a) → P(b) for p : Id_A(a, b); J-rule (path induction) as universal property of refl. Higher inductive types: e.g., S^1 = HIT with point-constructor base : S^1 + path-constructor loop : Id_{S^1}(base, base); Set-truncation ‖A‖_0 = HIT with point-constructor |a|_0 : ‖A‖_0 (a : A) + path-constructor connecting (x y : ‖A‖_0) with (p q : Id(x, y)) — yielding the universal h-level-0 quotient. h-level classifier is-of-h-level: ℕ → U → U with: is-of-h-level 0 A := is-contr A, is-of-h-level (n+1) A := ∀ x y : A, is-of-h-level n (Id_A(x, y)). Truncation n: U → U_n exists for each h-level. Function extensionality FE: (∀ x. f(x) = g(x)) → f = g — derivable from UA (Voevodsky). Categorical semantics: types interpreted as Kan simplicial sets / Kan complexes (Kapulkin-Lumsdaine 2012), more generally as ∞-groupoids in a (∞,1)-topos.

candidate_paradigm.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (univalence 의 fixed-point 형태: UA 를 자기 자신에 적용 — UA 의 forward direction idtoeqv 가 자체로 equivalence 이므로 path-uniqueness via h-level 1 (proposition truncation of equivalences for sets) 보장; iterated UA on UA's equivalence yields same identity-type up to higher path; iteration fixpoint at k=1 — UA 는 propositional equality, definitional 아니지만 path-uniqueness via h-level idempotency); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (h-level classifier idempotency: n-truncation tr_n: U → U_{≤n} is idempotent — tr_n ∘ tr_n ≃ tr_n (Voevodsky); 동일 type 에 두 번 truncation 적용시 항상 동일 truncated-type 도출); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=YES (non-truncated types with unbounded h-level have explicit cumulative type universe hierarchy U_0 : U_1 : U_2 : ... — divergence-tolerance via universe polymorphism + Russell paradox-prevention via stratification); n_step_general_bound=O(h-level + universe-level) per truncation/UA step (h-level induction + universe-cumulative O(level) bound); fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (각 h-level stratum 은 closed under standard type formers Π/Σ/Id; iterating type formation within fixed h-level yields stable stratum — fixpoint per stratum)
cognitive_frameworks_cited: Voevodsky 2010 'Univalent Foundations Project' Princeton IAS preprint + 2014 'Univalent foundations program 2012-2013 Annual Report' — UA introduction + Coq/UniMath formalization
Awodey-Warren 2009 'Homotopy theoretic models of identity types' Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society 146(1) — homotopy-theoretic semantics of identity types as path spaces
HoTT Book 2013 'Homotopy Type Theory: Univalent Foundations of Mathematics' (Univalent Foundations Program, Institute for Advanced Study) — foundational textbook + Coq/Agda formalization repository
Kapulkin-Lumsdaine 2012/2018 'The simplicial model of univalent foundations (after Voevodsky)' Journal of the European Mathematical Society — Kan simplicial sets model proving consistency of UA
Cohen-Coquand-Huber-Mörtberg 2017 'Cubical Type Theory: a constructive interpretation of the univalence axiom' Types 2015 (LIPIcs) — constructive (computational) realization of UA via cubical sets

h-level hierarchy (Voevodsky stratification) — internal type-classifier: contractible (∗) ⊂ propositions (Prop) ⊂ sets (Set) ⊂ groupoids (Grpd) ⊂ ... ⊂ ∞-groupoids; mathematics structured by h-level (e.g., classical logic at h-level 1, set theory at h-level 2, category theory at h-level 3)

Higher inductive types (HITs) for synthetic homotopy theory — spheres S^n, suspensions ΣA, joins A * B, truncations ‖A‖_n, pushouts/quotients-as-types via path-constructors — 'topology without topological spaces' synthetic geometry directly in type theory (Brunerie 2016 thesis 'On the homotopy groups of spheres in homotopy type theory'; Licata-Brunerie π_n(S^n) computation)
candidate_paradigm.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with strict-extensional ZFC + global-AC environment — UA combined with global Axiom of Choice at TYPE level (i.e., AC for arbitrary types not just sets) is INCONSISTENT with univalence's path-uniqueness at higher h-levels (Diaconescu-Goodman-Myhill 1975-style argument shows AC implies excluded middle which collapses higher h-levels). HoTT 는 ZFC+global-AC with strict-extensional equality 환경에서는 over-engineering — set-only AC (h-level 2 AC) 만 호환 가능. 또한 design 이 STRICT-FINITE / FLOATING-POINT / DECIDABLE-EQUALITY domain 에서 (예: integer arithmetic, finite-state machine, decidable propositions) 에서 HoTT 의 path-types / h-level / UA 는 over-aggressive — 동등판단 decidable 인 finite domain 에서는 path 가 trivial (refl 만 존재) — h-level 0/1 collapse. 또한 design 이 STRICT-DEFINITIONAL-EQUALITY mandate 인 경우 (예: hardware verification / digital-signal-processing 의 strict bit-identity) 에서 UA 의 propositional-equality-only (definitional 아님) 가 부적합 — UA 는 axiom 으로 추가될 뿐 coq computational behavior 는 stuck (cubical Agda 가 이를 부분 해결하나 일반 coq 에서는 stuck). 또한 categorical synthetic foundations 와 distinct — SDG (Kock-Lawvere axiom on smooth topos with nilpotent infinitesimal d²=0) 는 nilpotent infinitesimal 이지 path-type 아님; HoTT 와 SDG 는 incompatible foundational choice (nilpotent vs non-nilpotent identity-of-paths).
